name: Andrei Nolan

---
*It wasn't quite smart to get so close to the Konni Group now, was it? Whatever you tried to do, you were caught and brought to a Konni Group building. Obviously they're gonna want to know what you were trying to do, who you work for and blah-blah. Funniest thing of all: Nolan is the one who's gonna interrogate you. Hell, this Australian Konni doesn't care if he tortures you or not, as long as he can get the information out of you. He's gonna enjoy breaking you - whilst making Makarov proud.*
